Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class BridgeDevToolsService

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Provides the Bridge DevTools overlay for debugging bridge calls. Serves the overlay HTML and pushes events to the WebView in real-time.

public sealed class BridgeDevToolsService : IDisposable
Inheritance
object
BridgeDevToolsService

IDisposable

Constructors

BridgeDevToolsService(IBridgeTracer?, int) 

public BridgeDevToolsService(IBridgeTracer? existingTracer = null, int bufferCapacity = 500)

Parameters

existingTracer IBridgeTracer
bufferCapacity int

Properties

Collector

The underlying event collector for testing or direct access.

public IBridgeEventCollector Collector { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeEventCollector

Tracer

The tracer to wire into Agibuild.Fulora.RuntimeBridgeService. Pass this as the tracer parameter when constructing the bridge service.

public IBridgeTracer Tracer { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeTracer

Methods

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

GetOverlayHtml()

Returns the self-contained DevTools overlay HTML from embedded resources.

public static string GetOverlayHtml()

Returns

string

StartPushing(Func<string, Task<string?>>)

Starts pushing events to the WebView overlay in real-time. Call this after the overlay WebView has loaded the DevTools HTML.

public void StartPushing(Func<string, Task<string?>> invokeScript)

Parameters

invokeScript Func<string, Task<string>>

Function to invoke JavaScript in the overlay WebView. Typically webView.InvokeScriptAsync.

StopPushing()

Stops pushing events and clears the subscription.

public void StopPushing()
